name: test_historical_vaccination_file_upload_creates_child
description:
Test: Upload a vaccination file and verify the child record and vaccination record
   exist.
Steps:
1. Upload a vaccination file for a child not in mavis.
2. Navigate to children page and search for the child.
3. Open vaccination details for the child.
Verification:
- Vaccination record and child record exist.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Upload a vaccination file and verify the child record and vaccination record
exist.
Steps:

  1. Upload a vaccination file for a child not in mavis.
  2. Navigate to children page and search for the child.
  3. Open vaccination details for the child.
    Verification:
  • Vaccination record and child record exist.

statusTrace:
setup_hist_vaccs = None
schools = {'HPV': [School(name='Al-Zahra School', urn='147025', site=None), School(name="The Archbishop's School", urn='118898',...e='Pendeen School', urn='140670', site=None), School(name='The Cornwall Independent School', urn='112082', site=None)]}
page = <Page url='https://qa.mavistesting.com/patients?q=WALKER%2C+Carly&%5Bprogramme_types%5D%5B%5D=&programme_status_group=...ate_of_birth_month=&date_of_birth_year=&archived=0&missing_nhs_number=0&missing_nhs_number=1&aged_out_of_programmes=0'>
file_generator = <mavis.test.data.file_generator.FileGenerator object at 0x7f4313160130>
children = {'HPV': [Child(first_name='Carly', last_name='WALKER', nhs_number='9080292966', address=('Flat 82', 'Graeme Cliffs', '...org'), Parent(full_name='Janice Rowe', relationship=<Relationship.MUM: 'Mum'>, email_address='harry99@example.net')))]}

    def test_historical_vaccination_file_upload_creates_child(
        setup_hist_vaccs,
        schools,
        page,
        file_generator,
        children,
    ):
        """
        Test: Upload a vaccination file and verify the child record and vaccination record
           exist.
        Steps:
        1. Upload a vaccination file for a child not in mavis.
        2. Navigate to children page and search for the child.
        3. Open vaccination details for the child.
        Verification:
        - Vaccination record and child record exist.
        """
        child = children[Programme.HPV][0]
        school = schools[Programme.HPV][0]
    
        ImportRecordsWizardPage(page, file_generator).upload_and_verify_output(
            VaccsFileMapping.HIST_HPV
        )
    
        ImportsPage(page).header.click_mavis_header()
        DashboardPage(page).click_children()
    
        ChildrenSearchPage(page).search.click_advanced_filters()
        ChildrenSearchPage(page).search.check_children_aged_out_of_programmes()
        ChildrenSearchPage(page).search.search_for_child_name_with_all_filters(str(child))
>       ChildrenSearchPage(page).search.click_child(child)
